title: Origins: Item Sage
description: Equipped with a magical bag of endless capacity to store items, with each Unique Item adding to your Maximum Health. (For Fabric)
body:
# Item Sage
_"Equipped with a magical bag of endless capacity to store items, with each Unique Item adding to your Maximum Health."_
`Made for Fabric, Minecraft version 1.20.2, Origins version 1.12.10, Impact: 1, Icon: Enchanted Bundle`

### "Bagged Items"(Primary Active Ability, Default keybind = G):
_"Stuff the items in your mainhand into your bag by pressing [Primary Active]!"_
- [-] You can't enter an item that is already in your bag

### "Hand in Bag"(Secondary Active Ability, Default keybind = Unbound!):
_"You reach into your bag, and choose from 3 options which item to pull out! Uses [Secondary Active]!"_
- [+] The Items stored in your bag will keep all of their Enchantments and Tags! `You can even fit a single Shulker Box in there`

### "I <3 Items"(Passive!):
_"Your Health is equal to the number of Unique items inside your bag!"_
- [-] Overconfident and Reckless: When above 20 Max Health, your Armor no longer gives you Armor Points
- [-] When damaged: Return items from your bag into your Inventory equal to the damage taken.
- [-] When your Inventory overflows, the items drop on the ground instead!
- [-] You are very likely to drop a lot of items on the floor when you die, if you stored more items in your bag than there is space in your Inventory!

_Origin by Frucs, inspired by Doppo Kunikida, one of the main characters in the anime Bungo Stray Dogs, a fantastic anime where superhumans exist with different powers! Doppo Kunikida has the Unique Ability to study items and then recreate them using paper from his Notebook_
